schemas.title: Human Surface Policy Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack human-surface placement policy registry.

schemas.title: Retention Policy Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack retention-policy registry covering legacy history and transitional archive cleanup rules.

schemas.title: Initiative State
schemas.description: Schema for the authoritative current-state snapshot of one plan initiative.

schemas.title: Initiative Event Stream
schemas.description: Schema for one append-only initiative event record in the local event stream.

schemas.title: Task State
schemas.description: Schema for the authoritative current-state snapshot of one initiative-local task.

schemas.title: Task Event Stream
schemas.description: Schema for one append-only initiative-task event record.

schemas.title: Deferred Item Record
schemas.description: Schema for one initiative-local deferred item contract.

schemas.title: Discrepancy Record
schemas.description: Schema for one initiative-local discrepancy record.

schemas.title: Validation Bundle
schemas.description: Schema for the structured evidence shell attached to one initiative package.

schemas.title: Closeout Recap
schemas.description: Schema for the structured closeout shell attached to one initiative package.

schemas.title: Guidance Promotion Record
schemas.description: Schema for one initiative-local promotion shell or guidance-promotion record.

schemas.title: Promotion Policy Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack promotion policy registry covering extracted guidance review and mirror-update rules.

schemas.title: Plan Promotion Index
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack promotion index built from initiative-local guidance-promotion records.

schemas.title: Plan Guidance Index
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack guidance index built from governed plan/docs guidance records.

schemas.title: Relation Type Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack relation type registry covering controlled cross-artifact relation names.

schemas.title: Status Transition Rules
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack status transition rules covering family-specific allowed lifecycle and status transitions.

schemas.title: Artifact Family Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack artifact family registry covering placement rules, status subsets, renderability, and derived-index participation.

schemas.title: Lifecycle Stage Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack lifecycle-stage registry covering controlled lifecycle vocabulary separate from status values.

schemas.title: Review Status Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack review-status registry covering controlled approval-state vocabulary.

schemas.title: Source Type Registry
schemas.description: Schema for the plan-pack source-type registry covering controlled provenance vocabulary.

schemas.title: Project Record
schemas.description: Schema for the authoritative current-state snapshot of one project container.

schemas.title: Project Repository Map
schemas.description: Schema for the linked-repository contract attached to one project container.

schemas.description: Schema for the plan-workspace task summary index.

schemas.description: Schema for the plan-workspace readiness index.

schemas.description: Schema for the plan-workspace discrepancy index.
